metadata.name: staff-one-on-one
metadata.description: Converts one-on-one meeting transcripts into a structured summary using the One-on-One Meeting Notes Template
metadata.author: Nick Foard

when_to_use: This skill activates when the user wants to convert a one-on-one meeting transcript into a structured summary document.
purpose: Generate structured one-on-one meeting summaries from transcripts, populate the template, convert to PDF for emailing to staff.
tone: Professional, concise, action-oriented. Use bullet points for readability. Capture key insights without including full transcript.

placeholders.name: STAFF_NAME
placeholders.description: Name of the direct report (staff member)

placeholders.name: MANAGER_NAME
placeholders.description: Name of the manager conducting the one-on-one

placeholders.name: TRANSCRIPT
placeholders.description: The meeting transcript - either pasted text or path to Word file

placeholders.name: CHECK_IN
placeholders.description: Summary for Section 1: Check-in - How are they doing, anything top of mind?

placeholders.name: REVIEW_LAST_MONTH
placeholders.description: Summary for Section 2: Review of Last Month - wins, challenges, what's working/not

placeholders.name: CURRENT_FOCUS
placeholders.description: Summary for Section 3: Current Focus - priorities, resources needed, escalations

placeholders.name: CAREER_DEVELOPMENT
placeholders.description: Summary for Section 4: Career & Development - skills, under-utilised areas, support needed

placeholders.name: FEEDBACK_EXCHANGE
placeholders.description: Summary for Section 5: Feedback Exchange - manager feedback, staff feedback, start/stop/continue

placeholders.name: LOOKING_AHEAD
placeholders.description: Summary for Section 6: Looking Ahead & Wrap-up - key actions, upcoming changes, final thoughts

workflow.description: 5-Step Workflow: Initiation → Extract → Preview → Confirm → Generate PDF

conditionals.action: Parse the pasted text and extract content for each section

conditionals.condition: User provides path to Word transcript file
conditionals.action: Read the Word document using word_get_document_text, then parse and extract

steps.title: Initiation & Transcript Collection
steps.description: When user invokes skill, ask for the transcript. Acknowledge what you know. Ask: 'Please provide the meeting transcript - either paste the text here, or give me the path to the Word file.'

steps.title: Extract & Populate Sections
steps.description: Parse the transcript and populate each of the 6 template sections. Use bullet points for readability. Do NOT include full transcript - only summarize key points.

steps.title: Preview (Mandatory)
steps.description: Display a draft preview of all 6 sections in the OpenCode terminal. Show the populated fields clearly. Ask user to review and confirm. DO NOT generate PDF until user explicitly confirms with 'yes', 'looks good', or 'generate'.

steps.title: Confirm
steps.description: Wait for user confirmation. If user requests changes, go back to Step 2 for that specific section. Only proceed to Step 5 after explicit confirmation.

steps.title: Generate PDF
steps.description: After confirmation: (1) Copy template to a new working document, (2) Populate Date/Manager/Staff name fields, (3) Populate each of the 6 section headings with summaries, (4) Use word_convert_to_pdf to create PDF, (5) Save to Downloads folder with filename format: '{StaffName}-{dd-mm-yyyy}-OneOnOneNotes.pdf'

examples.title: Convert 1:1 Transcript to PDF
examples.user_says: Create one on one notes from this transcript for John Smith meeting on 11-03-2026
actions: Request transcript text or file path
Parse transcript and populate CHECK_IN, REVIEW_LAST_MONTH, CURRENT_FOCUS, CAREER_DEVELOPMENT, FEEDBACK_EXCHANGE, LOOKING_AHEAD

common_errors.cause: Template not found or path incorrect
common_errors.solution: Ensure template is in templates/ folder relative to skill
Manually review each section and ensure content is extracted from transcript
Sanitize staff name: replace spaces with hyphens, remove special chars
